title: Karnataka High Court seeks Centre’s response to X Corp's appeal against Sahyog portal
description: The Karnataka High Court on Tuesday sought the response of the Union government on an appeal filed by X Corp (formerly Twitter) challenging the Central government’s Sahyog portal - an online platform used to issue content takedown orders to online intermediaries like X [X Corp v. Union of India].X Corp told the Court that the Sahyog portal is being used by authorities across the country to issue online content takedown directions outside the statutory blocking process.A Bench of Chief Justice Vi
